creator: mikkel@troest.dk
text:
New and very interesting info:

The crash only happens on my installation, when I have the environment 
variable  "OOO_FORCE_DESKTOP" set to "gnome":
setenv OOO_FORCE_DESKTOP gnome

For the record, my gnome packages are listed below.

[mikkle@Beast /home/mikkle]>pkg_info | grep gnome

gnome-applets-2.22.0 Applets components for the GNOME 2 Desktop Environment

Desktop Envir
